name: The Sales Executive
effect: Commit the organization to a capability that does not yet exist. This card is considered visionary.

clauses.name: PROMISE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When a prospect asks about an unbuilt feature: The feature is considered on the roadmap.

clauses.name: HANDOFF CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When the contract is signed: The Sales Executive is considered no longer involved.

clauses.name: SCOPE EXPANSION EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the customer expects delivery: Engineering is considered aware of the commitment.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was any of that on the roadmap?
